name: Tow Truck
short_description: Tow Truck is a 3D car game. You got a job as a tow truck driver and it's your first day! You've received your first order and you can't screw it up! Get behind the wheel of your vehicle and go to your first job!
detailed_description:
Tow Truck is a 3D car game. You got a job as a tow truck driver and it's your first day! You've received your first order and you can't screw it up! Get behind the wheel of your vehicle and go to your first job!

Your task is to quickly arrive at the scene of the accident and repair the damaged car. Be careful and skillfully maneuver your tow truck, avoiding collisions with other cars and obstacles on the road. But be careful, you need to meet the deadline, otherwise you will have to try again! Are you ready to become a savior on the road and overcome all obstacles on the way to your goal?

★★★ Features ★★★
- Colorful graphics.
- Nice soundtrack
- Lots of levels
